message:
fix(api): make init_process_start idempotent with double-checked locking

Add double-checked locking pattern (check PROCESS_START_INITIALIZED,
acquire PROCESS_START_INIT_LOCK, check again) so init_process_start is
safe to call from multiple threads and only installs baseline once.

process_uptime_seconds and process_started_at_rfc3339 now call
init_process_start() lazily if baseline was not set by service bootstrap,
ensuring stable non-zero uptime. Invert bootstrap test to verify it
preserves existing baseline. Add tests for direct status/rollout reads
without bootstrap.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
